title: 1-star: 'The print didn't fit my frame.' Here's why.
caption:
Manual resizing in Photoshop or Canva introduces rounding errors.

Your 8×10 might actually deliver at 8×9.6 — just enough to misalign in a standard mat or frame.

Buyer prints it. Doesn't fit. 1-star review.

SnapToSize calculates every size to the exact pixel:
→ 8×10 = always 2400×3000px
→ A4 = always 2480×3508px
→ 300 DPI, frame-guaranteed

No rounding. No guessing. No 1-star reviews.

Link in bio → app.snaptosize.com
